role_summary: Architectural specification and domain mapping document outlining the system's bounded contexts, entity relationships, data flow, and integration sequence for the Automated Knowledge Translation pipeline.
extracted_finding: The system implements a strict, stage-gated, unidirectional pipeline for Automated Knowledge Translation, bounded by five core contexts: Repository Introspection, Semantic Extraction, Information Aggregation, Pipeline Orchestration, and External Intelligence Integration. Data flows sequentially with persisted intermediate states to ensure auditability and fault tolerance. Configuration entities enforce hard traversal boundaries, while immutable, timestamped extraction notes serve as the atomic input for downstream aggregation. The Orchestrator centrally coordinates execution and maintains pipeline health metrics, routing on-demand requests to external AI services for pattern resolution, narrative generation, and content synthesis. Cross-cutting observability tracks processing metrics in real-time. Identified architectural gaps include undefined mapping rules for grouping/filtering extraction notes into documentation sections, and missing integration contract specifications for data schemas, error handling, retry policies, and service versioning.
